name: compliance auto-refresh: successful refresh updates .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/<framework-id>.txt to new timestamp
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --framework-id x --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z && grep "2026-05-13" .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/x.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
